banner_matchers.value:
^SIP/2\.0 481 Call Leg/Transaction Does Not Exist
From: <sip:nm@nm>;tag=root
To: <sip:nm2@nm2>;tag=0-\w+-\w+-\w+-\w+
Call-ID: 50000
CSeq: 42 OPTIONS
Via: SIP/2\.0/TCP nm;received=[\d.]+;branch=foo
Content-Length: 0

$
